metadata.title: Grok Imagine Video 1.5 AI Video Generator | Toolaze
metadata.description: Use Grok Imagine Video 1.5 on Toolaze to create short AI videos from a starting image or prompt, with 1-15 second clips and 480p/720p output.

hero.h1: Grok Imagine Video 1.5 AI Video Generator
hero.desc: Use xAI's Grok Imagine Video 1.5 image-to-video model on Toolaze to turn a starting image into short motion clips, or draft a prompt-only scene in the Toolaze video workflow. Choose 1-15 seconds, 480p/720p, and aspect ratios for social clips, product motion, and storyboards.

demoVideo.label: Grok Imagine Video 1.5 16:9 product motion demo

modelIntro.title: What Is Grok Imagine Video 1.5?
description: Grok Imagine Video 1.5 is xAI's generally available image-to-video model for short motion clips. It works best when you give it a starting image and a prompt that describes motion, camera movement, atmosphere, pacing, and what should stay visually consistent.

Toolaze packages that model into a focused AI video generator with image-to-video and prompt-only drafting paths, one uploaded starting image, aspect ratio controls, default 3-second output, 1-15 second duration, and 480p or 720p resolution.
Use it for product motion reveals, vertical social clips, storyboard beats, scene look tests, character motion studies, and early video directions that need clear movement before a final edit.

featureCards.title: Image-to-Video From One Reference Image
featureCards.content: Upload one starting image up to 20MB, then describe the motion, camera movement, lighting, mood, and what should stay unchanged.

featureCards.title: Text-to-Video for Fast Concepts
featureCards.content: Start from a written scene description when no image is available. Prompt the subject, action, shot style, environment, and visual constraints.

featureCards.title: Practical Output Controls
featureCards.content: Choose Auto, 16:9, 9:16, 1:1, 3:2, or 2:3, then generate a default 3-second clip or choose 1-15 seconds at 480p or 720p.

items.title: Image-to-Video
items.desc: Upload one starting image and describe how it should move.

items.title: Text-to-Video
items.desc: Generate a video from a prompt without uploading a reference.

items.title: Focused Controls
items.desc: Set aspect ratio, 1-15 second duration, and 480p or 720p resolution before generating.

items.title: Video Preview
items.desc: Watch generated clips with native browser video controls.

items.title: Save Result
items.desc: Download the selected generated video after reviewing the clip.

performanceMetrics.title: Core Grok Video Settings on Toolaze

howToUse.title: How to Generate Videos with Grok Imagine Video 1.5

steps.title: Choose a Mode
steps.desc: Select image-to-video if you have one starting image, or text-to-video if you want to start from a prompt.

steps.title: Add Prompt and Settings
steps.desc: Describe the subject, motion, camera, lighting, and style. Choose aspect ratio, 480p or 720p, and a 1-15 second duration. The default is 3 seconds.

steps.title: Generate and Review
steps.desc: Generate the video, preview the returned clip, compare recent attempts, and download the result if you want to keep it.

scenes.title: Product Motion Tests
scenes.desc: Turn product stills into short motion concepts for ads, store pages, and launch visuals.

scenes.title: Social Video Concepts
scenes.desc: Generate quick vertical or square clips for short-form social experiments.

scenes.title: Storyboard Exploration
scenes.desc: Prototype a camera move or visual idea before investing in a full production pass.

scenes.title: Character Motion Tests
scenes.desc: Animate a reference character with subtle breathing, blinking, lighting, and camera movement.

bestPrompts.title: Best Grok Imagine Video 1.5 Prompt Examples

items.title: Product Reveal Prompt
items.prompt: Animate the uploaded product image into a 5-second premium product reveal. Slow push-in camera, subtle rotation, glossy reflections, clean studio lighting, realistic shadow movement, no extra text, commercial style.

items.title: Interior Camera Move Prompt
items.prompt: Use the uploaded room image as the reference. Preserve the layout and furniture. Add a gentle left-to-right camera drift, soft daylight through the window, moving curtain fabric, warm interior mood, realistic motion.
items.videoLabel: 16:9 interior camera move prompt example video

items.title: Storyboard Shot Prompt
items.prompt: Create an establishing shot for a science-fiction short film. A small research vehicle crosses a frozen plain under green aurora, wide-angle camera, slow forward motion, wind-blown snow, quiet cinematic tension.

comparison.title: Grok Imagine Video 1.5 vs Other Toolaze Models

rows.grok: Starting image plus motion prompt; prompt-only drafts also supported.
rows.seedance: Text, image, audio, and video; up to 9 images, 3 clips, 3 audio files.
rows.kling: Text, images, audio, video; references for characters, objects, and scenes.
rows.gptImage: Text and image input; still image output only.

rows.kling: Up to 15 seconds with native audio and voiceover.
rows.gptImage: Static image output for posters, edits, UI, and graphics.

rows.grok: Animating one strong starting frame for quick motion tests.
rows.seedance: Complex scenes using several source assets and audio cues.
rows.kling: Cinematic shots, dialogue, voiceover, and reference consistency.
rows.gptImage: Text-rich still images, edits, product visuals, and UI mockups.

rows.grok: Camera moves, atmosphere, physics, and starting-frame detail.
rows.seedance: Mixed references, action logic, audio matching, and video extension.
rows.kling: Shot control, lip sync, speech, text, and consistency.
rows.gptImage: Still composition, image editing, readable text, structured layouts.

rows.grok: Motion consistency, identity, physics, faces, hands, brand details.
rows.seedance: Multi-subject consistency, audio distortion, prompt drift, edit effects.
rows.kling: Shot continuity, lip sync, voice order, text retention.
rows.gptImage: Spelling, small text, layout accuracy, faces, hands.

rating.title: Built for Short Motion Concepts
rating.text: Use Grok Imagine Video 1.5 through a focused Toolaze workflow with upload, prompt, output settings, video preview, and download.

faq.a: Grok Imagine Video 1.5 is xAI's generally available image-to-video model for short motion clips. On Toolaze, it runs inside a focused web generator with image-to-video and prompt-only drafting paths.
Yes. Upload one starting image up to 20MB, add a prompt, and generate a default 3-second clip or choose another duration from 1-15 seconds.
Toolaze keeps a text-to-video entry for prompt-only scene drafts. For the strongest Grok 1.5 match, use a starting image and describe the motion you want.
The Toolaze workflow exposes mode, prompt, one uploaded starting image, aspect ratio, 1-15 second duration control, and 480p or 720p resolution.

faq.q: Is Grok Imagine Video 1.5 free on Toolaze?
faq.a: Availability may depend on the current Toolaze access policy, quota, model availability, and selected settings. Check the generator for the latest access state.
